goal: nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), mod_inv(c, system_modulus(system))) = nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), mod_inv(crt_canonical_solution(system), system_modulus(system)))

p.c: pairwise_coprime(system_moduli(system)) and every_modulus_positive(system) and satisfies_all(c, system) and c.coprime(system_modulus(system))

goal: zmod_mul(system_modulus(system), nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), c), nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), inv)) = nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), c * inv)
zmod_mul(system_modulus(system), nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), c), nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), mod_inv(c, system_modulus(system)))) = zmod_one(system_modulus(system))

p.c: pairwise_coprime(system_moduli(system)) and every_modulus_positive(system) and satisfies_all(c, system) and c.coprime(system_modulus(system))

goal: zmod_mul(system_modulus(system), nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), k), nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), inv)) = nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), k * inv)

p.c: function(x0: List[Pair[Nat, Nat]]) { nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(x0), crt_canonical_solution(x0)) = crt_canonical_zmod(x0) }(system)

goal: zmod_mul(system_modulus(system), crt_canonical_zmod(system), nat_zmod_mk(system_modulus(system), mod_inv(crt_canonical_solution(system), system_modulus(system)))) = zmod_one(system_modulus(system))
